title: Financial Accounting Fundamentals
description:
The Financial Accounting Fundamentals online course introduces the building blocks of financial reporting. You will gain insight into the relevance and value of accounting information, learn how to construct financial statements, and explore the accruals concept. 
 To explore these and related topics in more depth, consider enrolling in the full  Financial Analysis and Management Accounting  online certificate course from the London School of Economics and Political Science. The course offers exposure to a suite of financial and management accounting tools, enabling you to analyse real-world business challenges, interpret financial statements, and apply accounting information to assess a company’s historical performance, investment potential, and areas for improvement. It focuses on the important role of accounting in decision-making for both managers and investors.
institutions: The London School of Economics and Political Science
